title: Papa silly tag-monster — locked positions
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family comedy shot at @playground-park — green grass area beside the playground equipment, soft mulch transition zone, soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same physical spot from second 0 through second 10. Only Papa's playful arm + finger wiggle motion changes between beats. Sara and Eva DO NOT move, DO NOT change spots, DO NOT cross the frame. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame: one Papa, one Sara, one Eva. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME on hands and knees in the soft grass in a goofy playful 'silly tag-monster' crouch pose — both palms gently planted on the grass, both knees on the grass, big silly warm dad-grin, eyes crinkled with cheer. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times — palms on grass throughout. The grass stays plain green clean throughout. @Sara already on the LEFT side of the frame about three steps from Papa, standing on the grass with both feet planted, knees softly bent in a low playful dodge stance, both arms held softly out wide for balance, mouth open in a delighted warm giggle. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times — held out for balance. Sara stays in this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. @Eva already on the RIGHT side of the frame about three steps from Papa on the opposite side from Sara, standing on the grass with both feet planted, hands softly clapping with excitement at her chest height, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow bouncing softly. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times — clapping at chest height. Eva stays in this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa stays on hands-and-knees and gently wiggles his fingers playfully on the grass like a friendly cartoon-monster. Sara stays in her dodge stance laughing. Eva stays in her clapping spot bouncing softly. Papa (warm cheerful sing-song silly tag-monster voice, soft and playful, NOT scary, NOT shouting): "Tag-monster's coming for ya!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa stays in hands-and-knees pose, slowly wiggles his shoulders side-to-side in place. Sara giggles helplessly in her dodge stance, both arms still out for balance. Eva claps both hands faster in her exact spot, both feet still planted. Sara (cheerful warm giggle, still in her stance): "You can't catch us!" Eva (cheerful giggle, still clapping in place): "Too quick!" Papa (warm sing-song from his crouch): "Too quick! TOO quick for the silly-monster!" Cheerful warm kid-show family-comedy lighting throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both palms planted on grass. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Papa stays on hands-and-knees throughout with all four limbs in contact with the grass — no lunging, no diving, no leaping, no tackling. Each girl stays grounded with both feet planted on the grass throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running.
